title: SparklyWings Elytra Texturepack
description: Another texture pack I made specifically for my skin and decided to publish :]
body:
Another texture pack I made specifically for my skin and decided to publish anyone is free to use it just don't claim it as your own.
This texture pack retextures the elytra to look like purple wings with some sparkles on them you can see the pictures of the wings texture in Gallery
